description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated arms that extend upward and outward in a dramatic V-shape. The person has a slender build and is dressed in a sleeveless top and fitted pants, with visible shoes. The head is proportionate to the body, and the facial features are simplified. The arms are the most striking feature, appearing much longer than typical human proportions and creating a visually dynamic silhouette. The figure stands upright with both feet flat on the ground, and the overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, upward-stretching arms, wearing a sleeveless top and fitted pants, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top, and both elongated arms extending upward in a V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the arm's exaggerated length, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the sleeveless top, and the arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the arm's length, and the upright stance.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless casual top and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms raised and extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair parted in the middle
